Description: Set up the data layer: Dinosaur entity, EF Core DbContext, database migrations, and uniqueness constraints.
Register new dinosaurs in the system with required field validation and duplicate prevention.
All LINQ-based queries: listings, filters, projections, groupings, and advanced filters.
Modify existing dinosaur data, including security code update with confirmation.
Remove dinosaurs from the system by ID or email, with confirmation dialog.
System diagrams, GitHub repository setup, Docusaurus documentation, and Jira activity evidence.
